input.incoming_message: Can you confirm whether my payment was processed? I got charged but my account still shows unpaid.

expected_output.draft_body:
Hi,

Thanks for flagging this — I can see the charge on your end and I'm pulling up our payment records right now to figure out why the account is still showing as unpaid.

I'll come back to you within the next 2 hours with what I find. If you have the date of the charge handy, that'll help me narrow the search.

Thanks for your patience.
suggested_next_actions: Search the payment gateway for charges on this customer's account in the last 7 days
Cross-reference against the account's invoice records to find the mismatch

input.incoming_message: Hey, can we get the new dashboard feature shipped by EOW?

expected_output.draft_body:
Hey! Not going to happen by Friday — the dashboard feature has 2 unfinished pieces (the chart-rendering layer and the permissions check) that aren't going to land this sprint.

Next sprint is realistic. Want me to set up a quick sync to walk through what's left?
suggested_next_actions: Block 30 min on Friday to walk through remaining work with the requester
Update the project's status doc to reflect the next-sprint timeline

input.incoming_message: Where do I find my API key?

expected_output.draft_body:
Hi!

You can find your API key under Settings → API → "View Key". It's a one-click reveal — for security reasons we don't email the key, so you'll need to log in and grab it from there.

If you don't see Settings → API in your account, you may be on a plan that doesn't include API access yet — let me know and I'll check.
suggested_next_actions: No follow-up needed if customer confirms they found it; flag the account if they say they don't see Settings → API
